Read the calcofi YAML block from a single workflow file

Source: R/wrangle.R
read_calcofi_meta.Rd

Read the calcofi YAML block from a single workflow file

Usage

read_calcofi_meta(qmd_path)

Arguments

qmd_path

Path to one ingest_*.qmd (or any .qmd with a calcofi: YAML block).

Value

The parsed calcofi block as a list, augmented with provider_dataset and qmd, or NULL if absent. Use this in an ingest's setup chunk to read its own provider/dataset/ tables_owned from the authoritative YAML rather than hard-coding.

On this page
